#### File 3: `TEAM_CONTEXT.md` (Phân vai & Tiến độ)
```markdown
# Team & Module Assignments

## Identity & Store (Giang - Lead)
- Responsibility: Auth, OTP, Multi-step Register, Store Profile.
- Status: Core features done.

## Product Catalog (Thịnh)
- Responsibility: Listings, Image upload (Cloudinary).
- Note: Must use Hiếu's Rate Limiting.

## Inventory & Performance (Thành)
- Responsibility: Stock tracking, Redis Caching, Dapper.

## Order & Shipping (Hòa)
- Responsibility: Checkout, Order State Machine, PDF Labels.

## Marketing (Hải)
- Responsibility: Vouchers, Promotion rules.

## Analytics & Security (Hiếu)
- Responsibility: Rate Limiting (Redis), Serilog, Reports.

## CRM & Disputes (Tùng)
- Responsibility: Reviews, Ratings, Dispute handling.
